LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER LAKIETHA JOSEPH, RENEIL ISAAC, REGGIE BENNETT'S PETITITON PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 946.6 FOR RELIEF FROM LATE FILING OF GOVERNMENT ENTITY CLAIMS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULINGS, 1.) GRANT RELIEF AS TO LAKIETHA JOSEPH ONLY FILED WITHIN 1 YEAR AND MET BURDEN. 2.) DENY RELIEF AS TO RENEIL ISAAC JR AND REGGIE BENNETT SR. NOT FILED WITHIN A YEAR. 3.) STRIKE SUPPLEMENTAL PLEADINGS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/PB)BELDON YEE # 2647
